summary: Fake Notification Escape Mechanism (Phase 47) - All 25 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified with preset cards, notification banner, action overlay, create form, and history section. All 7 backend endpoints working correctly.

issues: React hydration warning about <span> inside <option> and <select> - cosmetic, does not affect functionality

GET /api/fake-notification/presets.returns_presets: PASS - Returns default presets (Team Meeting, Package, Security Alert, Mom Message) auto-seeded
GET /api/fake-notification/presets.preset_structure: PASS - Each preset has id, title, message, category, icon_style, is_default, created_at

POST /api/fake-notification/presets.creates_custom: PASS - Creates custom preset with title, message, category, icon_style

PUT /api/fake-notification/presets/{pres.updates_preset: PASS - Updates title, message, category, icon_style

DELETE /api/fake-notification/presets/{p.protects_defaults: PASS - Returns 404 when trying to delete default preset

POST /api/fake-notification/trigger.with_preset_id: PASS - Triggers notification using preset_id, returns notification_id, title, triggered_at
POST /api/fake-notification/trigger.with_custom_title: PASS - Triggers notification with custom title/message
POST /api/fake-notification/trigger.sse_broadcast: PASS - Broadcasts fake_notification_incoming event via SSE

POST /api/fake-notification/complete/{no.sends_alert: PASS - When send_alert=true, sets alert_sent=true and broadcasts escape_alert SSE

GET /api/fake-notification/history.returns_history: PASS - Returns history array with count field
GET /api/fake-notification/history.respects_limit: PASS - Limits results to specified amount
GET /api/fake-notification/history.entry_structure: PASS - Each entry has id, title, message, category, trigger_method, status, viewed, dismissed, alert_sent, triggered_at, completed_at

frontend_ui.nav-escape-notification: PASS - Navigation link works, positioned between 'Escape Call' and 'Route Monitor'
frontend_ui.fake-notification-page: PASS - Main container loads correctly with data-testid
frontend_ui.notif-presets-grid: PASS - Shows preset cards in 2-column grid layout

preset_cards.default_presets: PASS - Team Meeting (Work), Package (Delivery), Security Alert (Security), Mom Message (Message) shown with Default badge
preset_cards.color_coding: PASS - Each category has distinct color scheme (blue/green/red/purple/gray)
preset_cards.delay_options: PASS - Now/10s/30s/1min/2min buttons work, button text updates (e.g., 'Send in 30s')
preset_cards.icon_display: PASS - Shows category-appropriate icons (calendar, package, shield, message)

frontend_ui.add-notif-preset-btn: PASS - 'New Notification' button shows create preset form

create-notif-preset-form.title_input: PASS - Title input with placeholder 'e.g. Doctor Appointment Reminder'
create-notif-preset-form.message_textarea: PASS - Message textarea for notification body
create-notif-preset-form.save_cancel_buttons: PASS - Cancel and 'Save Notification' buttons work

frontend_ui.notif-history-card: PASS - Expandable section shows past notifications with status badges
frontend_ui.history_entries: PASS - Shows title, timestamp, trigger method, status badges (Viewed/Alert/completed/triggered)

banner_phase.slide_in_animation: PASS - Banner slides in from top

action_overlay_phase.full_screen_overlay: PASS - z-index 9998, centered modal with backdrop blur
action_overlay_phase.title_and_message: PASS - Shows notification title, category, and full message
action_overlay_phase.alert_button: PASS - 'Alert Trusted Contacts' button (amber) sends alert via API
action_overlay_phase.safe_dismiss_button: PASS - 'I'm Safe — Dismiss' button (gray) closes overlay

sse_handlers.fake_notification_incoming: PASS - Handler registered in FamilyDashboard (line 1481-1485), setFakeNotifData called
sse_handlers.NotificationOverlay_integration: PASS - NotificationOverlay rendered when fakeNotifData is set

critical_code_review_comments: Default presets correctly seeded on first GET /presets (Team Meeting, Package, Security Alert, Mom Message)
Custom presets deletable, default presets protected
Trigger endpoint logs to fake_notification_logs table and broadcasts SSE event
Complete endpoint updates notification status and optionally broadcasts escape_alert
History endpoint returns notifications sorted by triggered_at DESC
NotificationOverlay component has 2 phases: banner (slides from top) and action overlay (centered modal)
Banner auto-dismisses after 12 seconds via setTimeout (AUTO_DISMISS_MS = 12000)
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
SSE handler for fake_notification_incoming registered in FamilyDashboard
Escape Call feature (Phase 46) still working - nav link, preset cards, history all functional
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Default presets (Team Meeting, Package, Security Alert, Mom Message) auto-seeded on first access. Test presets created during pytest were cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fake Notification Escape Mechanism fully tested. Backend: 7 endpoints under /api/fake-notification prefix - presets CRUD, trigger, complete, history. Default presets (Team Meeting/Work, Package/Delivery, Security Alert/Security, Mom Message/Message) auto-seeded on first GET /presets. SSE events: fake_notification_incoming (triggers notification UI), escape_alert (sends alert to trusted contacts). Frontend: FakeNotificationPage at /family/escape-notification shows preset grid with delay options and expandable history. NotificationOverlay has 2 modes: banner (slides from top with View/Dismiss) and action overlay (Alert Trusted Contacts / I'm Safe). Auto-dismiss after 12 seconds. Navigation link 'Escape Notification' in sidebar between 'Escape Call' and 'Route Monitor'. Escape Call feature (Phase 46) verified still working.

verified_features.default_presets: Working - Team Meeting, Package, Security Alert, Mom Message auto-seeded
verified_features.trigger_notification: Working - Creates notification log, broadcasts SSE
verified_features.complete_notification: Working - Updates status, optionally sends alert
verified_features.notification_banner: Working - Slides in from top with View/Dismiss buttons
verified_features.action_overlay: Working - Alert Trusted Contacts and Safe Dismiss options
verified_features.create_preset_form: Working - Title, category dropdown, message textarea
